violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Microwave interior found with old food buildup.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Clothes basket found on sink at time of inspection.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — ---Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap.---Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device.
